parameters.content:
## 🐕 Review Watchdog PRO

**What it does:** every day it checks your Google Business reviews, catches any new low-star review, drafts a careful reply, and emails it to you so you can respond fast — before a bad review sits there festering.

### Setup (≈8 minutes)
1. Get a **Google Places API key**: console.cloud.google.com → enable "Places API" → create a key.
2. Find your **Place ID**: developers.google.com/maps/documentation/places/web-service/place-id → search your business → copy the Place ID.
3. Open **Your business** → paste your Place ID.
4. Open **Get reviews** → set the `key` query field to your API key.
5. **Draft reply (AI)** → add your OpenAI API key.
6. **Alert me** → connect Gmail; set your email in the To field.
7. Activate the workflow. It watches daily and only pings you on reviews of 3★ or below.

💡 Google's API returns your most recent reviews — enough to catch new trouble early.
💡 Want it fully set up? Add done-for-you at checkout.

— WorkflowStacks Premium Tool

parameters.subject: =⚠️ New {{ $('Low rating only').item.json.rating }}★ review needs a reply
